ddls:
CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the production */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., film, play, TV show) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the production was released or is scheduled to be released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the production */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production, released) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the production */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the production (in minutes) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the production */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the production is based */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the production */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase for the production */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL for the production's poster or main image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL for the production's trailer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the production */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the production */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the character is in */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the character (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation or role of the character */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Brief backstory or background of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the character's image or portrait */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Measure of the character's importance in the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "scene_number" INTEGER /* Number of the scene in the production */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the scene is in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the scene takes place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the scene */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the scene (in seconds) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the scene occurs in the production (in minutes from the start) */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Description of the lighting setup for the scene */,
  "soundtrack" TEXT /* Description of the soundtrack or background music used in the scene */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the scene */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood or atmosphere of the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dialogue_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line of dialogue */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene the line is in */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character speaking the line */,
  "line_text" TEXT /* Text of the line */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Number of the line within the scene */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion conveyed in the line */,
  "intonation" TEXT /* Intonation or tone of the line */,
  "is_dialogue" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the line is actual dialogue or a description */,
  "is_sung" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the line is sung */,
  "is_subtitled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the line is subtitled */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL for a transcript or detailed breakdown of the line */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the line occurs in the scene (in seconds from the start) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "character1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the interaction */,
  "character2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the interaction */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene the interaction takes place in */,
  "line_count" INTEGER /* Total number of lines in the interaction */,
  "scene_count" INTEGER /* Total number of scenes the interaction spans */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words spoken in the interaction */,
  "emotion_intensity" INTEGER /* Measure of the intensity of the emotions in the interaction */,
  "conflict_level" INTEGER /* Measure of the level of conflict or tension in the interaction */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the characters */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_interactions_character2_id FOREIGN KEY ("character2_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_interactions_character1_id FOREIGN KEY ("character1_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_interactions_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the director's image or portrait */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the director has received */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works the director has directed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the producer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the producer's image or portrait */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the producer has received */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works the producer has produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the actor */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent representing the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the actor's image or portrait */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the actor has received */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works the actor has appeared in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent represents */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the agent */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the agent's image or portrait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., cinematographer, editor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the crew member's image or portrait */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the crew member has received */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works the crew member has contributed to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the crew member is assigned to */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member started working on the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member finished working on the production */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the crew member is the lead in their role */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_crew_assignments_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_crew_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES production_crew ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scriptwriter, director, producer) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's image or portrait */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
